cluster.title: Run lifecycle & streaming
cluster.summary: End-to-end run flow: goal composer POSTs a run through chat-transport and the facade into runtime_api's RunCoordinator, which seals AgentRuntimeContext and enqueues a worker command; the runtime_worker drives LangGraph, every step persists as a RuntimeEventEnvelope with monotonic sequence_no, Postgres NOTIFY wakes the API's SSE replay-loop, and clients resume via ?after_sequence. Backend pipeline is solid and single-sourced; weaknesses are serial worker dispatch (cancel starvation), a broken second SSE subscription in TcSwimlanes, three parallel client projection pipelines, and a hand-mirrored cross-language event-type contract that fails closed.

nodes.summary: Conversation/run create -> queue -> worker LangGraph execution -> sequence-numbered RuntimeEventEnvelope persistence -> NOTIFY-driven SSE with after_sequence resume -> client projection, plus approvals round trip and best-effort cancel.

edges.label: web App.tsx mounts RunDestination for the run slug
desktop destinationBinders mounts RunDestination
useRunSession consumes api-types envelope guard + Transport port (chat-transport)
POST /v1/agent/runs from RunDestination goal composer (via Transport)
GET /v1/agent/runs/{id}/stream?after_sequence=N, eventName runtime_event
TcSwimlanes second per-run SSE subscription (broken: omits eventName)
legacy ChatScreen streamRunEvents with its own reconnect/backoff
renderer IpcTransport -> main TransportBridge replays SSE subscriptions over IPC
forwards run create/get/events/cancel/approval-decision with server-stamped identity
byte-level SSE passthrough of /runs/{id}/stream (timeout=None)
RunCoordinator persists run + user message and RUN_QUEUED via PersistencePort/EventStorePort
RuntimeRunCommand/CancelCommand/ApprovalResolvedCommand enqueued on RuntimeQueuePort, claimed by worker loop
user policies + BYOK provider-key snapshot resolved at run-create (keys split out before persistence)
RuntimeRunHandler builds deep-agent harness and streams via StreamingExecutor
streamed model calls per sealed model_profile (also anthropic/google/ollama via same resolver)
RuntimeEventProducer appends sequence-numbered envelopes (single projection of activity_kind/display_title/summary/status)
event INSERT + NOTIFY runtime_events_v1 '<run_id>:<seq>' in same transaction
PostgresEventBus LISTEN loop wakes per-run SSE waiters (10s poll backstop)
RUNTIME_START_IN_PROCESS_WORKER dev path spawns worker task in the API process (in-memory stores only)
RuntimeEventEnvelope + event-type/activity-kind enums hand-mirrored into api-types (no codegen)
